official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound cookie_request packet fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official cookie_request Identifier body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state
Write and dispatch-decode the full official Play clientbound cookie_request frame

official_functions.function_or_member: ClientboundCookieRequestPacket.key(), ClientGamePacketListener extends ClientCommonPacketListener extends ClientCookiePacketListener
official_functions.role: Read the decoded cookie_request key and confirm the Play listener cookie surface

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns cookie_request immediately after container_set_slot.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the cookie_request id to ClientboundCookieRequestPacket.
The official ClientboundCookieRequestPacket body is the cookie key as FriendlyByteBuf Identifier.
The fixture uses Identifier.parse(String) and ClientboundCookieRequestPacket(Identifier), so it does not require an initialized client, server, level, registry contents, cookie store, or game state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded key, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.

This contract does not prove cookie storage policy, cookie request/response runtime behavior, initialized client/server state, runtime Play entry, world load, spawn readiness, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer cookie storage policy, cookie request/response runtime behavior, initialized client/server state, runtime Play entry, world load, spawn readiness, render readiness, or client-load completion.
